Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to infer case groupings We have 18 events Each event has patient age gender department activity There are three distinct patients age 45 M age 62 F age 28 M They correspond to separate cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to produce grouping case1 patient 45 M case2 patient 62 F case3 patient 28 M

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: But we must consider that some events may belong to same patient but different departments But the attributes show same age gender and maybe same resource

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For example event 1 Register patient age45M in ER event 4 Initial triage for same event 12 Doctor consultation for same

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: event 13 Wait 13 is surgery performed for age28M So not same

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Event 15 Patient discharged for age45M in ER So all events with that combination belong to case1

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Similarly for age62F events 2 register 5 triage 8 lab test requested by Dr Smith in ER etc discharge at event17

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For age28M events 3 register in Surgery dept Actually register at surgery dept That seems odd but maybe pre surgery registration Then doctor consultation 6 by Dr Lee in Surgery dept scheduled knee surgery Then surgery preparation 9 surgery performed 13 recovery room 16 discharge 18 All these belong to case3

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Thus we can assign each event a inferred Case ID like C1 C2 C3 or based on patient details

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Also note that there might be confusion about department differences but still same patient because other attributes match exactly age gender We can also use timestamp ordering within each group as chronological sequence of the patient journey

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case A Patient ID unknown Age 45 Male Register at ER Initial triage Doctor consultation X ray imaging Doctor consultation again that is part of this patient timeline Patient discharged

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case B Patient B Age 62 Female Register Initial triage Lab test requested Lab test completed Doctor consultation diagnosis minor infection Prescription created antibiotics Patient discharged

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case C Patient C Age 28 Male Register at Surgery dept Doctor consultation scheduled knee surgery Surgery preparation Surgery performed arthroscopy Recovery room stable Patient discharged followup physiotherapy sessions
